ab: Vali, ulra u i ruma’?
en: Vali, are you home?

ab: ulra, kunamun usavak.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Vali, ulra u i ruma’?
en: Vali, are you home?

ab: uniyan i ruma’ i Vali, i Saya ku, ulra kakudain diyamaw? nu muruma’ lra intaw, kulra rengayaw.
ch: B:Vali不在家耶!我是Saya，有什麼事嗎? 回來我來告訴她。
en: Vali is not at home. I am Saya. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: i iman mu?
en: Who are you?

ab: mumu, i Saya di i Sahar mi, cuwalray mi diya!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Saya和Sahar，請幫我們開門一下!
en: Grandma, we are Saya and Sahar, please open the door for us.

ab: i iman idu?
en: Who is it?

ab: i Lahay ku, duwa ku maya’a kani Asang.
en: I am Lahay, I am here for Asang.

ab: mumu, duwa ku mena’uwa kannu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: sawariyan u lra adi duwa, salaw ku sare’ed kannu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Muymuy, duwa ku maya’a kanu kivangavanga.
en: Muymuy, I am here to play with you.

ab: kunamun usavak, mangarangara ku kannu mu!
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: mau nangku sinaleman ini na vurasi, talrami mekan a!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: tavu’ ini na vurasi.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: kadika! mau nangku sinaleman na inaakan na vuwa’ ini, talrami mekan.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: tavu’ ini na inaakan na vuwa’.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: kayan diya! mau nangku sinaleman na adi pinucemelan na kudumu nahni. talrami mekan a!
ch: A:請坐!這些是我種的有機玉米吃看看吧!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: wayi! salaw tavu’ ini na kudumu.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: yaakan u da vartenuk?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: adi ku karuwa mekan da vartenuk, mekana ku kana linggo maruwa lra.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就可以了。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: yaakan u da pingkan?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ai, ’aylra saya nu kemadu, lrayuwan!
ch: B:好的，那就給我一個吧，謝謝！
en: Sure, then I’ll have one. Thank you!

ab: kumurica ku diya da inaakan na vuwa’ paakan kannu.
ch: A:我先來削水果給你吃吧！
en: Let me peel the fruit for you first.

ab: lrayuwan! sadu tu danum ini na inaakan na vuwa’.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: melaka ku da danum pa’au kannu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: lrayuwan!
en: Thank you.

ab: kasaduyu mekan, sadu ku dineru di tinusiyaw.
ch: A:多吃點，我煮了很多菜餚。
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: wayi! pukasa kana ngulringulr di imaran a!
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kasaduyu mekan, ulra diya sadu kani.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: adi ku lra kaira.
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kasaduyu mekan, ulra diya sadu kani a!
ch: A:多吃點，這裡還有很多喔!
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: sadu lra ku inkan, adi ku lra maruwa mekan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
